title: SPAC updates, public/private market overview, Putin's end game & more
description:
0:00 Bestie intros!

1:03 SPAC updates, state of the public/private markets

20:26 US VCs have $290B in dry powder and raised a record amount in H1 2022, is the market nearing a bottom?

31:14 Risks of backing Putin into a corner, Russia's end game, conditions for conflict

50:45 Government-heavy climate plans, Dilbert/ESG backlash

1:01:20 Poker plans, chess cheating scandal

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses SPAC updates, the state of public and private markets, and the risks of backing Putin into a corner. They also touch on government-heavy climate plans and the Dilbert/ESG backlash. The episode covers various topics, including the US VCs' dry powder and the potential for conflict. The hosts also share their thoughts on poker plans and the chess cheating scandal.

takeaways.text: US VCs have $290B in dry powder
Risks of backing Putin into a corner
Poker plans and chess cheating scandal

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss various risks and potential conflicts, indicating a cautious tone. They also touch on the potential for the market to near a bottom, but overall the sentiment is cautious due to the geopolitical tensions and market uncertainty.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of US VCs' dry powder and record amount raised in H1 2022
Risks of backing Putin into a corner and potential for conflict
Government-heavy climate plans and Dilbert/ESG backlash
